title: Definitive HUD
description: Minimalistic HUD is a texture pack that simplifies the game interface by removing unnecessary elements and making the HUD more concise and understandable.
body:
**Minimalistic HUD** is a texture pack that simplifies the game interface by removing unnecessary elements and making the HUD more concise and understandable. It will help you focus on the gameplay without being distracted by the details of the game's interface.

Main features of the texture pack:
minimalistic design of HUD elements; simplified interface for a more comfortable gameplay;
easy perception of information on the screen; save all necessary functions in a convenient\format.

With this texture pack, your game will become cleaner and more visually pleasing.
